main_hypothesis.justification: Anchor 'daño mecánico elemento líder telescoping + golpe ariete + VFD mal configurada' literal.

recommended_action.justification: Detener + reemplazar + reconfigurar VFD ≥120s — match operacional.

requested_data.justification: Pide tiempo rampa VFD configurado — match accepted.

decision_change_condition.justification: Single: probe test conductividad distribuida → degradación.
